title: Miner's Rule Cumulative Fatigue Damage and S-N Curve Life Estimation
content: Linear damage accumulation D = Σ(n_i/N_i) where n_i cycles at stress amplitude σ_i and N_i = C/σ_i^m from the Basquin S-N curve. Failure when D ≥ 1.0. For structural steel (S355): Basquin constants C = 10^12, m = 3. Vibration acceleration amplitudes converted to pseudo-stress via σ ≈ E·a·L²/(2π·f_n)² for beam-like structures. Peak extraction via rainflow counting. Real-time embedded damage accumulation allows remaining fatigue life estimation and predictive maintenance alerts.
